name: Trabzon Liman Isletmeciligi Anonim Sirketi
summary: Trabzon Liman Isletmeciligi Anonim Sirketi operates the Port of Trabzon connecting Europe and Asia. It offers jetty, dock, warehousing, machinery and equipment, pilotage and towage, sea vessels, service vehicles, and other services. The company is based in Trabzon, Turkey.
